title: Dash
description: Ability for a rideable entity to dash.

cooldown_time.title: Cooldown Time
cooldown_time.description:
The dash cooldown in seconds. Default value is 1.000000.

Sample values:
• camel: 2.75

horizontal_momentum.title: Horizontal Momentum
horizontal_momentum.description:
Horizontal momentum of the dash.

Sample values:
• camel: 20

vertical_momentum.title: Vertical Momentum
vertical_momentum.description:
Vertical momentum of the dash.

Sample values:
• camel: 0.6
